reason: result wall-clock telemetry; not part of the AgJSON turn record (no semantic home, non-replayable).
result wall-clock telemetry; not part of the AgJSON turn record (no semantic home, non-replayable).
result-level boolean restating subtype (success⇒false); carried as turn.done vs turn.error, so the ambient false has no separate home.
Anthropic assistant-message container handle (null here); provider session plumbing with no AgJSON home.
null when a text block has no citations; populated citations ARE mapped (see content.block citations). Null carries no value.
content-block discriminant (thinking/text/tool_use/tool_result); consumed structurally to fan out, never a value-bearing payload.
Anthropic context-management directive (null here); provider control plumbing with no AgJSON home.
assistant role IS carried on message.start.role; the user tool_result role maps to tool.done (no role field), so the 'user' literal has no home.
Anthropic stop-detail object (null here); finish semantics are carried via turn.done.finishReason.
the matched stop sequence string (null here); not surfaced in AgJSON (finishReason 'stop' suffices).
constant 'message' tag on the assistant payload; structural, not value-bearing.
granular per-TTL cache-creation breakdown (null here); the scalar cache_creation_input_tokens IS mapped to message.end.usage.cacheWriteTokens.
inference-region telemetry on the assistant usage; operational metadata with no AgJSON usage home.
server-loop iteration telemetry on the assistant usage; operational metadata with no AgJSON usage home.
server-tool request counts on the assistant usage (null here); the result-level server_tool_use IS summed into turn.done.usage.serverToolRequests.
billing service-tier on the assistant usage; commercial metadata with no AgJSON usage home.
latency-tier hint on the assistant usage; operational metadata with no AgJSON usage home.
model capability constant (context window size); not an actual usage measurement, no AgUsage home.
model capability constant (max output tokens); not an actual usage measurement, no AgUsage home.
result agent-loop turn count; run-level telemetry with no AgJSON turn-record home.
null on top-level messages; when non-null it IS mapped to parentTurnId (subagent.start / tool.done turn routing). Null = top-level, no home.
SDK session id; derives turnId (turn_<session_id>) and assistant turn.start.threadId. The result-message session_id has no verbatim home (turnId is a derived rename).
guuey-runtime MCP-App UI sibling (tool_use_result), consumed by the guuey UI/metering pipeline directly off the native SDKMessage; OUT OF SCOPE for the AgJSON content normalizer by design.
guuey-runtime MCP-App UI visibility sibling (tool_use_result); consumed by the guuey UI pipeline, not the AgJSON content normalizer.
guuey render-cache marker (tool_use_result), read by the guuey generation-metering pipeline directly off the native SDKMessage; NOT part of the AgJSON content contract.
guuey render-cache kind marker (cold/warm/hot) on the metering sibling; consumed by guuey metering, not the AgJSON normalizer.
guuey render-cache savings counter on the metering sibling; consumed by guuey metering, not the AgJSON normalizer.
SDKMessage discriminant (assistant/user/result); consumed structurally to route normalization, not a value-bearing payload.
per-TTL cache-creation breakdown on the result usage; the aggregate cache_creation_input_tokens IS mapped to turn.done.usage.cacheWriteTokens.
per-TTL cache-creation breakdown on the result usage; the aggregate cache_creation_input_tokens IS mapped to turn.done.usage.cacheWriteTokens.
inference-region telemetry on the result usage; operational metadata with no AgUsage home.
billing service-tier on the result usage; commercial metadata with no AgUsage home.
latency-tier hint on the result usage; operational metadata with no AgUsage home.
SDK per-message uuid; the result-message uuid derives turnId only when session_id is absent, otherwise it has no AgJSON home.
